arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners, Chelsea learn 'mammoth' Alexander Isak asking price
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly demanding at least £115m for the services of striker Alexander Isak, who is attracting interest from Arsenal and Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Liverpool send 'very good' message to Newcastle United as £186.7m wages truth told
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has hailed Eddie Howe as a 'very good' manager ahead of facing Newcastle United next month. Only Newcastle (11) have conceded fewer goals than Liverpool in the Premier League this season while the black-and-whites and the league leaders are the only sides yet to drop a point from winning positions in 2024-25.

arts.ttl: Premier League: 10 talking points from the weekend’s action
arts.sum: Amad Diallo shows versatility, Ethan Nwaneri offers plenty of potential and Danny Welbeck’s role is key for Brighton For the established full-back, a wing-back role must be liberating, permission granted to embark on an adventure in the other half. Amad Diallo was faced with the less desirable situation against Ipswich, a forward forced to track back as he slotted in on the right of Ruben Amorim’s 3-4-2-1. Diallo retained his attacking aggression, immediately rampaging forward and evading challenges to set up Marcus Rashford’s early opener. He was responsible in defence and one of United’s brightest performers in a mostly bleak display, even threatening to deliver a late winner when cutting inside into the box to let fly. Diallo is most likely just a stopgap in the position but his adaptability has some worth as Amorim searches for his best XI. arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU name the Newcastle team who beat Chelsea 2-0 at Stamford Bridge in a game that featured an iconic wonder goal?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe issues challenge that couldn't make Alexander Isak transfer feelings any clearer
arts.sum: Newcastle's 25-year-old Swedish striker has been in red-hot form of late and ahead of their meeting with West Ham on Monday night, his manager has made his feelings very, very clear

arts.ttl: Newcastle United takeover lawyer spots 'mistake' as he calls for PSR 'interference'
arts.sum: The independent football regulator has made a 'mistake' by not intending to 'interfere' with the Premier League's PSR rules. I think if the regulator is serious about financial sustainability and wants to encourage competitive balance, it needs to look at and interfere with those financial rules."

arts.ttl: Talks soon: Arsenal set to rival Man United & Newcastle for January forward transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are the latest club to show an interest in the potential loan signing of Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani ahead of the January transfer window. The France international has struggled to make much of an impact during his time at PSG, despite previously being highly regarded after a strong spell at Eintracht Frankfurt, […] The post Talks soon: Arsenal set to rival Man United & Newcastle for January forward transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Manchester United ready to pounce for Newcastle-linked midfielder as move now with Dan Ashworth
arts.sum: According to Sky Sports Germany journalist Florian Plettenberg, Manchester United are making plans to potentially table an offer ahead of the January transfer window in an effort to get a deal done early. Atalanta midfielder Ederson has his eye on a move to England and could find himself in the country sooner than he maybe anticipated with Manchester United reportedly ready to make their move.
